Notes.Text:
This update for Mesa fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2026-40393: out-of-bounds memory access can occur in WebGPU because the amount of to-be-allocated data depends on
  an untrusted party (bsc#1261998).

Vulnerabilities.Description: In Mesa before 25.3.6 and 26 before 26.0.1, out-of-bounds memory access can occur in WebGPU because the amount of to-be-allocated data depends on an untrusted party, and is then used for alloca.
